overall.description: Game engine footage from the bridge of a cargo ship navigating through stormy seas at night. The view shows the ship's bow cutting through choppy waters with active navigation displays and radar visible overhead, punctuated by a distant lightning flash.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking the bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring the radar sweep and navigation charts while moving through rough seas

entered.detail: red-painted bow of the vessel with deck railings and equipment visible
left display showing nautical chart with landmasses in yellow and blue water
center circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep arm
right blue-tinted display showing vessel data and readouts
choppy dark water with visible wave crests and whitecaps
dark gray overcast sky covering the horizon
metal safety railing on the left side of the bow deck
metal safety railing on the right side of the bow deck

segments.scene_description: View from inside the ship's bridge looking forward over the bow. Three navigation screens display charts and rotating radar overhead while the vessel moves steadily through choppy, dark waters under heavy storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking the bow

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the distant storm clouds on the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through the storm while monitoring the radar display

entered.detail: bright white lightning bolt striking in the distance beyond the ship's bow

segments.scene_description: The ship continues through the rough seas as a sudden lightning bolt flashes across the distant horizon, briefly lighting up the storm clouds before fading back to darkness, with the radar continuing its steady sweep.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward-facing perspective from the ship's bridge as a steady voyage through a dark storm is punctuated by a sudden flash of light. It begins with a view over the bow, where the vessel cuts through choppy, dark waters under a heavy canopy of storm clouds. Overhead, three navigation screens and a rotating radar provide a steady glow of data against the gloom of the exterior. As the ship maintains its course through the rough seas, a sudden lightning bolt flashes across the distant horizon, briefly illuminating the turbulent clouds. The scene then fades back into darkness, leaving only the rhythmic sweep of the radar to guide the ship forward.
